truthfulness.hosted_page: This hosted page is a guided walkthrough of the submitted Munus Lite workflow using frozen submission evidence.
truthfulness.proof_links: Proof links and bundle flags are live references to the exported strict-live submission bundle.
truthfulness.state: Workflow states shown here are non-destructive and do not submit new on-chain actions.

steps.title: Step 1: Path, persona, permissions
steps.description: Pick the guided path, role perspective, and execution context before touching workflow states.
highlights: Audit/outbox guarantees are represented in each state card

steps.title: Step 2: Choose offering
steps.description: Select an offering package and confirm document/disclosure posture before buyer-side operations.

steps.title: Step 3: Deploy preflight + execution context
steps.description: Review preflight controls, custody signing narrative, and transfer/coupon policy touchpoints.

steps.title: Step 4: Deployment status + proof / next actions
steps.description: Inspect strict-live proof links, HTS + EVM evidence, and native lifecycle paths.

personas.name: Issuer Finance
personas.what_to_check: Offering package completeness, buyer-side constraints, and coupon payment readiness.
personas.decision: Approve the offering package for municipal distribution controls.

personas.name: Municipal Advisor
personas.what_to_check: Disclosure publication posture and signer-backed attestations.
personas.decision: Confirm disclosures are published and advisory evidence is attached.

personas.name: Issuer Admin
personas.what_to_check: Preflight controls, execution context, and deployment guardrails.
personas.decision: Authorize progression to deployment visibility state.

personas.name: Custody / Transfer Agent
personas.what_to_check: Transfer checks, custody signing narrative, and deployment tx references.
personas.decision: Confirm transfer controls and custody evidence align with policy.

personas.name: Auditor
personas.what_to_check: Proof flags, required slots, and native lifecycle path evidence.
personas.decision: Validate strict-live proof completeness against bundle expectations.

offerings.name: Munus Lite Series A (Sandbox)
offerings.description: Guided buyer-side municipal distribution workflow package for sandbox-scoped rehearsal.

offerings.name: Munus Lite Series B (Companion)
offerings.description: Companion sandbox package showing the same non-destructive workflow with alternate offering metadata.

role_handoffs.what_to_look_at: Offering documents, policy package, and coupon readiness.
role_handoffs.decision_or_evidence: Confirm buyer-side municipal distribution workflow baseline.

role_handoffs.what_to_look_at: Disclosure publication and signer-backed operation narrative.
role_handoffs.decision_or_evidence: Validate guidance checkpoints before execution context review.

role_handoffs.what_to_look_at: Preflight checklist and execution context controls.
role_handoffs.decision_or_evidence: Authorize progression to deployment proof visibility.

role_handoffs.what_to_look_at: Transfer-check decision card and deployment tx references.
role_handoffs.decision_or_evidence: Confirm custody signing narrative and control evidence.

role_handoffs.what_to_look_at: Proof flags, required slots, and strict-live bundle metadata.
role_handoffs.decision_or_evidence: Verify HTS + EVM and native lifecycle path evidence.

what_this_proves: Audit/outbox guarantees mapped to submission evidence
